name: Chocolate Pecan Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the sugar, salt, corn syrup, cooled chocolate, melted butter, eggs, and vanilla.
2. Beat until well blended using an electric mixer on medium speed.
3. Stir in the pecans.
4. Pour into the unbaked pie shell.
5. Bake at 375 degrees F (190 degrees C) for 35 minutes or until set.
6. Cool on a wire rack.
